chain.thought: Explanation: Team Liquigas (Franco Pellizotti) earned 15 points, and Rabobank (Denis Menchov) earned 11 points. The difference is 4 points.

judge_thought: Explanation: Team Liquigas (Franco Pellizotti) has 15 points, and Rabobank (Denis Menchov) has 11 points. The difference is 15 − 11 = 4, so Liquigas scored 4 more points than Rabobank.
